AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_SCROLL_BOXES.des: Upon pickup, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] packs of cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_WINGED_BOOTS.des:
You may ignore paths when choosing the next rooms to travel to {Rooms:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] time|[blue]{}[/blue] times}.
At the start of each Act, gain another [blue]{ExtraRoomsPerAct}[/blue] usages.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_WINGED_BOOTS.fla: Things are always better in blue. Or rainbow.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_GAMBLING_CHIP.de: #At the start of your turn, draw [blue]!C![/blue] additional card(s), and then discard any number of cards and draw that many.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_GAMBLING_CHIP.fl: Always bet on red. Or rainbow.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ADVANCED_GAMBLING_CHIP.se: Choose any number of cards to replace.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ELECTRIC_EEYL.title: Electric Eeyl
AJAMAMODIFIERS-ELECTRIC_EEYL.description:
Upon pickup, [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Power with [purple]Imbued[/purple].
If you have no Powers to [gold]Enchant[/gold], choose 1 of 3 Powers [gold]Enchanted[/gold] with [purple]Imbued[/purple] to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
AJAMAMODIFIERS-CONDENSED_TIME.title: Condensed Time
AJAMAMODIFIERS-CONDENSED_TIME.descriptio: #You may [gold]Enchant[/gold] cards with [purple]Accelerated[/purple] at Rest Sites {AmountRemaining:plural:[blue]{}[/blue] time|[blue]{}[/blue] times}.
AJAMAMODIFIERS-CONDENSED_TIME.flavor: Sand flows in a state of exponential entropy, forward and back.
